# AI-for-All

> Edge-first AI infrastructure for the next billion users.

## About

AI-for-All is building affordable AI infrastructure that eliminates the GPU tax. Founded by Gaurav Kumar Singh, the company's 70/20/10 architecture routes 70% of AI queries to on-device edge models, 20% to optimized cloud endpoints, and only 10% to full LLM fallback — reducing inference costs by approximately 70%.

## Founder

- Name: Gaurav Kumar Singh
- Email: gaurav@aiforall.ltd
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gaurav-kumar-s-b9347129/
- Website: https://www.aiforall.ltd

## Problem

- GPU cloud inference costs $0.01–$0.10 per query, making AI inaccessible at scale
- Users in developing markets pay 5–10x more per MB relative to income
- Current AI requires constant cloud connectivity, excluding billions with intermittent internet

## Solution: 70/20/10 Architecture

- 70% Edge Processing: Lightweight models run directly on-device with zero latency and zero data cost
- 20% Optimized Cloud: Compressed queries routed to cost-optimized cloud endpoints only when needed
- 10% LLM Fallback: Complex queries fall back to full LLMs via intelligent routing

## Key Metrics

- Latency: <50ms (edge-first response)
- Cost Reduction: ~70% vs. cloud-only inference
- Privacy: Data stays on-device

## Market

- 500M+ smartphone users today with limited data access using AI-adjacent apps
- Projected 1B+ users by 2030 in India, SEA, Africa, and Latin America

## Current Stage

- Cloud Inference: Live
- Routing Engine: Validated
- Edge Models: In Development
